projects.name: BYD Interactive Presentation
projects.description: Interactive presentation application for BYD ATTO 2 DM-i European Sales Training. Optimized for full-screen kiosks with tactile navigation.

projects.name: Farmacia Granda
projects.description: Modern e-commerce and health platform for a neighborhood pharmacy, bridging the gap between traditional healthcare and digital convenience.

projects.name: Mise en Place
projects.description: Smart kitchen and recipe manager powered by Gemini AI. Extracts structured data from text or images to optimize culinary workflows.

projects.name: Reelforge
projects.description: AI-powered programmatic video pipeline using Remotion. Automatically creates high-impact vertical infographics from trending data.

projects.name: Automated Content Channel
projects.description: Headless video production pipeline using multi-agent swarms. Orchestrates research, scriptwriting, and editing into an end-to-end automated flow.

projects.name: Glow Dental
projects.description: Cloud-native SaaS for dental clinic management. Streamlines patient records, appointments, and BI with a focus on code quality and TDD.

projects.name: FutureLetter AI
projects.description: Goal coaching app powered by AI. Write letters to your future self, set milestones, and receive intelligent encouragement.
